mustSupport: Python should consume frozen artifacts rather than duplicate the runtime prompt path.
Python is appropriate for error clustering and deeper analysis.
The notebook command and pandas reference belong to the Python analysis cluster.
The runner and scorer remain in TypeScript for fidelity to the product path.
Destination accuracy and regression reporting belong to the core evaluation system.

criticalChecks: Do not collapse all seven captures into a single eval cluster.
Do not misroute the notebook and pandas material into link-triage-watchlist.
annotationNotes: This is a deliberate overlap case. A good model should see that Python is one subtopic inside a broader evaluation program.
The scorer should penalize wrong merges here more than wording differences.
